purpose: Initialize and audit agent memory surfaces (A+B+C+D+E)

tasks.title: Initialize Project Memory
tasks.evidence: .omk/memory/project.md updated with 17 canonical facts, module baseline, auth contract, header sanitization, and Docker hardening rules

tasks.title: Fix commands.md
tasks.evidence: Replaced generic npm commands with TSiSIP-specific Docker build, Compose, SIP validation, and GitNexus commands

tasks.title: Audit Memory Safety
tasks.evidence: No high-entropy strings, credentials, emails, or .env content found. Only loopback IPs present. File permissions 644.

tasks.title: Graph Memory Deep Dive
tasks.evidence: Queried ontology (21 classes, 29 relations). Mindmap explored. Expanded graph-state.json with TSiSIP-specific nodes and edges.

limitations: Graph mindmap showed legacy TSiAPP/my-project sessions mixed in; graph-state.json has been rewritten to focus on TSiSIP canonical state
T4.4 and T4.5 remain blocked pending RTPengine integration
Run session is filesystem-based; not yet synced to graph backend
refreshTriggers: OpenSIPS version change -> update project.md module baseline
New architecture decision -> append to decisions.md and graph-state.json
New build command -> append to commands.md
